inputs.label: Observed Time (OT)
inputs.businessContext: Average observed time per cycle from time study

businessContext_i18n.en: Average observed time per cycle from time study
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman etüdünden çevrim başına ortalama gözlemlenen süre
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche beobachtete Zeit pro Zyklus aus der Zeitstudie
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps observé moyen par cycle issu de l'étude des temps

inputs.label: Rating Factor
inputs.businessContext: Performance rating to adjust pace (100% = normal)

businessContext_i18n.en: Performance rating to adjust pace (100% = normal)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tempoyu ayarlamak için performans değerlendirmesi (%100 = normal)
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistungsbewertung zur Anpassung des Tempos (100 % = normal)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Notation de performance pour ajuster l'allure (100 % = normal)

inputs.label: Allowance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Allowance for personal, fatigue, delays (percentage of normal time)

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowance for personal, fatigue, delays (percentage of normal time)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişisel, yorgunluk, gecikmeler için izin (normal sürenin yüzdesi)
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuschlag für persönliche, Ermüdungs- und Verzögerungszeiten (Prozentsatz der Normalzeit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Majoration pour besoins personnels, fatigue, aléas (pourcentage du temps normal)

inputs.label: Number of Cycles Observed
inputs.businessContext: Number of cycles timed to compute average; used for standard deviation

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cycles timed to compute average; used for standard deviation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalamayı hesaplamak için zamanlanan çevrim sayısı; standart sapma için kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der für den Durchschnitt gestoppten Zyklen; wird für die Standardabweichung verwendet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de cycles chronométrés pour calculer la moyenne ; utilisé pour l'écart type

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Observed Times
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the observed cycle times (minutes)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of the observed cycle times (minutes)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type des temps de cycle observés (minutes)

businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Genauigkeit (Präzision) als Prozentsatz (z. B. 5 für ±5 %)

inputs.label: Z-score for Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Standard normal deviate for desired confidence (e.g., 1.96 for 95%)

label_i18n.fr: Score Z pour le niveau de confiance

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard normal deviate for desired confidence (e.g., 1.96 for 95%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen güven için standart normal sapma (örn. %95 için 1,96)
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardnormalverteilungs-Quantil für die gewünschte Konfidenz (z. B. 1,96 für 95 %)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart normal réduit pour la confiance souhaitée (ex. : 1,96 pour 95 %)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
